_doc: Per-repo last-scanned commit for portfolio-refresh. After a refresh pass scans `git -C <repo> log <last>..HEAD`, it ADVANCES each entry to that repo's current HEAD. Seeded with the HEADs of the key showcased projects on 2026-06-14. Add a repo here when it earns a place on the site.

_notes./home/codex/Projects/FREDGPT.zip: FredGPT source archive (null = not a git repo; treat as case-study source rather than git log). The published assets already live in portfolio/public/fredgpt/ + the FredGPT case content. FredGPT confidentiality rules apply — see AGENTS.md (never publish anything from the zip's Private/ folder).
_notes./home/codex/Projects/TreAxe: Co-owned with a collaborator. Prefer TreAxe's own official screenshots from docs/features/*/images/ over re-captures.
